name: /architect profile-aware option narrowing filters options incompatible with the active profile
command: mkdir -p profiles && printf 'allowed_languages: [python]\n' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect.sh" "input" --profile profiles/p.yaml --enumerate-options --grounding-stub multi-lang --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -q 'narrowed_to_profile=p' out.txt && grep -q 'filtered_options>=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
